_comment: FINAL real on-chain DarkBox/Frontier contracts on the AttestMesh hidden chain (chainId 88813). History: the chain was clique-stalled at block 1 from boot (a 2-signer clique can't advance with one active sealer) so the original deploy never mined; after geth-2 was promoted to a co-signer the chain advanced, but the deploy STILL failed because the vendored Frontier lib (FrontierDeployers._store) used the Cancun MCOPY opcode, invalid on this London-only chain (forge --broadcast fire-and-forget hid the gas-estimation failure). Fix: recompiled the contracts for evm_version=london with mcopy->MLOAD/MSTORE loop (dan-attestmesh-deployer 6bca5e2). Extra gotcha: phala cvms restart reused the CACHED cancun deployer image, so the london image only ran after pinning the digest in the compose. THESE are the final, fully-mined addresses (2026-06-14); ALL earlier sets (incl. 0x671703 as factory) were forge-simulated/partial-run artifacts. Indexer watches marketFactory + discovers books dynamically from MarketCreated.
